title: Algerian Dumplings with Herbs
description: A flavorful and tender dumpling recipe with a hint of North African spices, wrapped in a delicate xvelvety pastry.
instructions: Roll out xvelvety pastry dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a dumpling in the center of each dough circle.
Brush edges with olive oil and fold dough over dumplings to form a half-moon shape.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of algerian herbs for garnish.
